title: Boosting Game Stats with Pointer Arithmetic

content.problemStatement:
In this task, you will take 5 game stat values from the user, store them in an array, and use pointer arithmetic to increase each stat by 50%. The updated stats will then be displayed.

**Tasks:**

1. Input the 5 stats into an array using a `for` loop using pointer arithmetic (`ptr + i`).
2. Use another `for` loop to update each stat by increasing it by 50% (`*(ptr + i) += *(ptr + i) / 2`).
3. Finally, use a `for` loop to print all the boosted stat values using pointer arithmetic.

---
